mapper.sql: SELECT ATNDLC.ATNDLC_ID , ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID , ATNDLC.USER_ID , ATNDLC.SCYR , ATNDLC.CMCRS_GBNCD , ATNDLC.AUDITYN , USR.USER_RPRS_ID , USR.STDNT_NO , USR.USERNM , USR.DSBLYN , DEPT.DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON ATNDLC.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON DEPT.DEPT_ID = USR.DEPT_ID WHERE ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : StdInfoDAO.stdInfoListPaging 설 명 : 수강생 정보 목록 페이징 */
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.DEPTNM, A.USERNM, A.STDNT_NO) AS LINE_NO , A.* , COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM (
) A WHERE 1=1
AND A.DSBLYN = 'N' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N'
AND A.DSBLYN = 'Y'
AND A.AUDITYN = 'Y'
AND ( LOWER(A.USER_RPRS_ID) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(A.STDNT_NO) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(A.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
